strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with Node.js/TypeScript and React, far exceeding the 6+ year bar
Active AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, Selenium course author, Fluent-Asserts library, Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
Cloud exposure is AWS-only (AWS CDK at Optilyz); no GCP/Azure and limited PostgreSQL evidence (MongoDB/MySQL only)
Significant career investment in DLang, which is not part of the target stack and may signal a preference for niche tooling
response.justification: Candidate clearly meets the seniority and fullstack bar: Optilyz (TypeScript, AWS CDK, React, MongoDB) and re:cinq (TS/Node plus MCP and agentic tooling) directly map to the role's TypeScript/Node/React core and the AI-agent requirement. Testing competency is well evidenced via TDD practice at RIDE, the Fluent-Asserts D library, and authoring a multi-module Selenium/TDD course, which transfers cleanly to Vitest even though Vitest itself isn't named. Database coverage is partial (MongoDB and MySQL present, PostgreSQL not cited), cloud is AWS-only, and Nest.js is absent from the resume, so those are the main gaps. CS degree and Docker/Kubernetes (GISCollective) are satisfied. Overall the evidence supports a strong fit with a couple of named-framework gaps worth probing in interview.
